import React from 'react'; import { X, FileText, Calendar, DollarSign, Building2, Package, Clock, RefreshCw } from 'lucide-react'; import { ClientContract } from '@/types/gcc'; import { StatusBadge } from '@/components/ui/StatusBadge'; import { calculateStatus } from '@/utils/contractUtils'; import { formatDateBR } from '@/utils/dateUtils'; import { useContracts } from '@/context/ContractContext'; import { ChevronRight, ArrowLeft } from 'lucide-react'; interface ContractQuickViewModalProps { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; contract: ClientContract | null; } export const ContractQuickViewModal: React.FC = ({ isOpen, onClose, contract }) => { const [expandedPrevId, setExpandedPrevId] = React.useState(null); const [showGenealogy, setShowGenealogy] = React.useState(false); const { contracts } = useContracts(); // Get the full lineage using the utility // We handle null contract case inside the memo to satisfy hook rules const lineage = React.useMemo(() => { if (!contract) return []; const result: ClientContract[] = []; let parentId = contract.renewal_base_id; while (parentId) { const parent = contracts.find(c => c.id === parentId); if (parent) { result.unshift(parent); // Chromological order: oldest first parentId = parent.renewal_base_id; } else break; } return result; }, [contract?.id, contract?.renewal_base_id, contracts]); if (!isOpen || !contract) return null; const calculatedStatus = calculateStatus(contract.expirationDate, contract.status); return (
e.stopPropagation()} > {/* Header */}

{showGenealogy ? 'Histórico de Genealogia' : 'Detalhes do Contrato'}

{showGenealogy ? `Ciclo de ${lineage.length + 1} versões` : contract.service}

{showGenealogy && ( )}
{/* Content */}
{/* Status Section */}
Status do Contrato
{/* Client Information */}
Informações do Cliente

{contract.clientName}

{contract.opportunityNumber && (

{contract.opportunityNumber}

{contract.renewal_base_id && ( {lineage.length}ª Renovação )}
)}
{/* Service Information */}
Serviço Contratado

{contract.service}

{contract.manufacturer}

{/* Financial Information */}
Informações Financeiras

{new Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR', { style: 'currency', currency: 'BRL' }).format(contract.currentTotalValue || contract.value)}

{contract.periodicity}

{contract.modality || '-'}

{/* Contract Dates */}
Vigência

{formatDateBR(contract.startDate)}

{formatDateBR(contract.expirationDate)}

{/* Links/Lineage Information */} {contract.renewal_base_id && (
Rastreabilidade de Renovação

Este contrato possui {lineage.length} antecessor(es). O fluxo de renovação preserva toda a linhagem comercial desde a origem.

{showGenealogy && (
{lineage.map((prevContract, idx) => (
{/* Timeline Dot */}
setExpandedPrevId(expandedPrevId === prevContract.id ? null : prevContract.id)} >
{idx === 0 ? 'Contrato Raiz' : `${idx}ª Renovação`}

{prevContract.opportunityNumber}

{expandedPrevId === prevContract.id && (

{new Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR', { style: 'currency', currency: 'BRL' }).format(prevContract.currentTotalValue || prevContract.value)}

{formatDateBR(prevContract.expirationDate)}

{prevContract.periodicity}

{prevContract.modality || '-'}

{prevContract.manufacturer}

{prevContract.paymentTerm || '-'}

{prevContract.service}

{prevContract.notes && (

"{prevContract.notes}"

)}
)}
))} {/* Current Contract Indicator */}
Contrato Atual ({lineage.length + 1}ª Versão)
)}
)} {/* Additional Information */} {contract.dueDay && (
Informações Adicionais

Dia {contract.dueDay}

)} {/* Observações */} {contract.notes && (
Observações

{contract.notes}

)}
{/* Footer */}
); };
